headline: P&L exposure: ₹590 Cr direct fraud (engine estimate) + ₹407.1 Cr cascading compliance, regulatory, and reputational costs (engine estimate)
what_matters: P/E compression of 0.2-0.5x (engine estimate) due to governance shock; margin erosion of 223.5 bps; revenue at risk: ₹73.8 Cr (engine estimate).
Cost of capital expected to rise by 20-40 bps (engine estimate) as per BRSR/SEBI triggers; potential for FII outflows as ESG funds rebalance.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹590 Cr direct fraud (engine estimate) + ₹407.1 Cr cascading compliance, regulatory, and reputational costs (engine estimate)
